meaning: Put an end to STH (relationship, discussion, talks, negotiations)

meaning: Stop speaking, especially suddenly

meaning: Separate a part (or become separate) from a larger piece

meaning: Surrender control or responsibility for STH/SB to SB else, esp. officially

meaning: Give STH to SB by holding it in one's hand and offering it to them

meaning: Invest or devote so as to achieve STH (time, effort, work)

meaning: Put one thing inside another; include or insert

meaning: Provide a place for SB to live or stay

meaning: Deliberately take no action/remain passive about STH

meaning: Move upward, from a lower spatial location to a higher one

meaning: Move to a better position; advance to a higher level/rank

meaning: ( + with …) Continue doing STH after stopping; proceed with STH

meaning: Move backwards or make SB/STH move backwards

meaning: Present or stage (play, show, competition)

meaning: Put a piece of clothing or jewelry onto one's body

meaning: Take STH/SB to a place they were in before

meaning: See or hear with difficulty

meaning: Pay back the effort spent in doing STH by becoming profitable or effective

meaning: Go away from, leave (train, bus, aircraft, lift)

meaning: Arrive or make an appearance somewhere

meaning: Increase the volume or level of STH

meaning: Yield; be (or make STH be) found, discovered, or noticed

meaning: Come down from STH; descend (car, horse, tree)

meaning: Lower one's body as by kneeling, sitting or lying

meaning: End the provision of STH, or be deprived of a provision (electricity, money)

meaning: Make STH known or accessible to the public (information, products)

meaning: Get rid of dirt or mess

meaning: Explain or present STH clearly, esp. officially and in writing

meaning: Start a journey

meaning: Start doing or working on STH, esp. with a particular goal in mind

meaning: Undergo chemical decomposition; separate into different substances

meaning: Lose control of one's emotions and yield to tears or distress

meaning: Divide or separate into categories or smaller components so as to make it easier to understand or deal with

meaning: Stop working or functioning; fail or collapse (vehicle, device, relationship, negotiations)

meaning: Make an effort to address or communicate with SB, so as to help them or involve them in STH

meaning: Stretch an arm in order to hold, touch, or get STH that is within short distance
sentence: She reached out for the empty jar on the table.

meaning: Make STH continue

meaning: Build or place STH somewhere

meaning: (+ with …) Be willing to accept STH unpleasant or not desirable; tolerate

meaning: Display or attach STH (e.g. to a wall) so it can be seen

meaning: Move so as to face in the opposite direction

meaning: Make STH become better or more successful than it previously was (economy, business)

meaning: Take action in order to support STH or make it happen

meaning: Move or drive backwards a short way

meaning: Take care of SB and make sure they are well; protect SB's interests

meaning: Look outside, or at the horizon

meaning: Obtain an official document or service from an authority

meaning: Invite to a recreational place or social event

meaning: Remove or extract STH from a container

meaning: Look at STH/SB again after having momentarily looked elsewhere

meaning: Move upward, or from a lower spatial location to a higher one
